examples: The artwork is in the shape of a mastaba.
Which of the following words can best describe The London Mastaba?
The London Mastaba is about 65 feet high, 98 feet wide and 130 feet long, and it weighs about 1.3 million pounds.
Initially conceived with his wife Jeanne-Claude in 1977, the Mastaba will take barrel-stacking to the ultimate level.
You might be forgiven for thinking Christo disingenuous when he claims that the Mastaba has nothing to do with Arab oil production.
